items.title: The Stein Line on possible Nuggets pursuit of Jaylen Brown:
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
The Stein Line on possible Nuggets pursuit of Jaylen Brown:

"Sources say that the Nuggets have at least internally discussed whether they have the asset wherewithal to join the trade chase for Boston's Jaylen Brown...Yet to emerge as a bonafide landing spot for the Celtics' MVP candidate."

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Craig Hodges. Long Beach St G was drafted 48th by SD in 82. Very thin, was vulnerable on D but was solid in SD & MIL. Came to CHI in 89 & was vet 3-point guy off the bench. Won 3-point contest in 90, 91 & 92. Cut in 92, ending career on controversial note.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Craig Hodges. Long Beach St G was drafted 48th by SD in 82. Very thin, was vulnerable on D but was solid in SD & MIL. Came to CHI in 89 & was vet 3-point guy off the bench. Won 3-point contest in 90, 91 & 92. Cut in 92, ending career on controversial note.
